case_title: JEAN GRISARD ET AL VS. DENISE HALL

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM AND ORDER FILED BY HALL, DENISE GRISARD, JEAN
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY GRISARD, JEAN BOKTOR-GRISARD, MARY AS TO DEFENDANT HALL, DENISE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-09-2016 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $0.00) SERVED JUL-09-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT HALL, DENISE

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DENISE HALL ON SEP-22-2016 - DENIED. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
NOTICE OF APPEAL - UNTIMELY FILED FILED BY APPELLANT HALL, DENISE MAILED TO RESPONDENT GRISARD, JEAN BOKTOR-GRISARD, MARY

REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT HALL, DENISE

ORDER DISMISSING SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-30-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-30-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF JEAN GRISARD, ONLY; EXCEPT PLAINTIFF MARY BOKTOR-GRISARD WHO WAS NOT PRESENT AT TODAYS HEARING. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-30-2016 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GRISARD, JEAN BOKTOR-GRISARD, MARY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HALL, DENISE $1,518.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,593.00, INCLUDED IN THE JUDGMENT IS AN AWARD OF STATUTORY DAMAGES IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,000.00 DUE TO DEFENDANT'S FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH CIVIL CODE SECTION 1950.5 (L) IN BAD FAITH. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
RECORD REMANDED TO SMALL CLAIMS (NO EXHIBITS TRANSFERRED)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-09-2016 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO AUG-30-2016 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE HEARING SET FOR NOV-03-2016 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 525
